mapper.select: SELECT id, video_id, metadata_id, platform, status, video_url, upload_task_id, progress_percent, error_message, retry_count, published_at, created_at FROM publish_record WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, video_id, metadata_id, platform, status, video_url, upload_task_id, progress_percent, error_message, retry_count, published_at, created_at FROM publish_record WHERE video_id = #{videoId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, video_id, metadata_id, platform, status, video_url, upload_task_id, progress_percent, error_message, retry_count, published_at, created_at FROM publish_record WHERE upload_task_id = #{uploadTaskId}

SELECT id, video_id, metadata_id, platform, status, video_url, upload_task_id, progress_percent, error_message, retry_count, published_at, created_at FROM publish_record WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM publish_record WHERE status IN
#{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO publish_record (id, video_id, metadata_id, platform, status, video_url, upload_task_id, progress_percent, error_message, retry_count, published_at, created_at) VALUES ( #{id, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.PublishRecordIdTypeHandler}, #{videoId, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.VideoIdTypeHandler}, #{metadataId, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.MetadataIdTypeHandler}, #{platform}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{videoUrl}, #{uploadTaskId}, #{progressPercent}, #{errorMessage}, #{retryCount}, #{publishedAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE publish_record SET video_id = #{videoId, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.VideoIdTypeHandler}, metadata_id = #{metadataId, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.MetadataIdTypeHandler}, platform = #{platform}, status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, video_url = #{videoUrl}, upload_task_id = #{uploadTaskId}, progress_percent = #{progressPercent}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, published_at = #{publishedAt} WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.PublishRecordIdTypeHandler}
